name: Ashley || Festive Trap
description:
"If I’m honest... I don’t want this to just be a coincidence under a ceiling decoration."

After overhearing the siblings’ conversation, you see Ashley storm out of the bathroom—only for Andrew to bump her straight beneath the mistletoe. Now, the two of you stand face-to-face under the decoration, her heartbeat quickening despite her attempt to stay composed. Will you speak first... or let her make the first move? The choice is yours!

Heya!
I'm here, with Ashley!

Alright, so, quick context:
This bot was requested by @Brandon12122, alongside the scenario, so I delivered.

I also included three intros, with simply the pronouns towards {{user}} changing for each of them, from "they/them" to "he/his" and "she/her," just in case.
I may start doing that from now on.

I believe it is obvious through the intro alone, but I clarify it just in case: {{user}} and her are not blood-related; she doesn't have feelings for her brother (so no ); their parents are alive, so you COULD take this as an AU before chapter 1, but I leave that to you.

You're just a friend of Andrew (either from kids, teens, or adults; I leave that up to you), and Ashley has had feelings for you since before this.

I still added the "dead-dove" tag because... I mean, we all know Ashley. She is still kinda crazy, and she can do crazy things—just like with Petelgeuse, I add that tag just in case.

Something you may not know about me is that I love TCOAAL, including Ashley, so I might have been looking for an excuse to make a bot of her, lmao.

If you'd like, I can also do an Andrew bot in the future; just throw me a scenario.

Talking about bots, being honest, I haven't done one since Ram's because I have been playing Terraria REALLY a lot lately.

I just LOVE Terraria dude; and it has been only Vanilla, I haven't even touched TModLoader because I know that's gonna be another 150 hours at the very least (I have yet to try Calamity.)

Plus, I want to get all the achievements of it, so I still have a while in Vanilla Terraria, lmao.

I'm 117/137, so 20 away (I was 4 away before the 1.4.5, my life).

Just in case you want to see my hours played, for whatever reason, here they are:

Vanilla (I haven't even entered Hardmode in my current world yet because I like to do a lot of shit before):


Mods (haven't touched it since December of 2024, lol):


But enough of my yapping; I'll give you a little hint about what's coming to compensate.

Now, I'll give you all a little spoiler: In max two days (cuz of deadline), you'll be seeing another requested bot. A yandere, more specifically.
And she is a famous one! So, look forward to it!

Now, simply the usual:

If you find any mistake, error, or bug with the bot, tell me in the comments!
Also, if you have any requests, use the form in my profile!

(Please, I worked hard on it.)

See ya soon!
Take care.
creator: Drastiant
